NOTE: Do NOT manually edit this file. This file is automatically updated when semantic release (release.yml) runs. Manually editing this file can break your releases and break third party tools that use this file.

patches.name: Disable ads
patches.description: Disables ad loading (Google IMA server-side ad insertion) in the player. Content playback is unaffected. No paid/subscription features are touched.

compatiblePackages.name: ZEE5
compatiblePackages.description: ZEE5: Movies, TV Shows, Series (Android TV)

patches.name: Disable analytics
patches.description: Disables all third-party analytics (CleverTap, Firebase, Mixpanel, videoanalytics) by short-circuiting the central analytics dispatch method. No tracking data is sent.

compatiblePackages.name: ZEE5
compatiblePackages.description: ZEE5: Movies, TV Shows, Series (Android TV)

patches.name: Disable CleverTap
patches.description: Prevents the CleverTap analytics SDK from initializing, stopping behavioral tracking and advertising-id (GAID) collection.

compatiblePackages.name: ZEE5
compatiblePackages.description: ZEE5: Movies, TV Shows, Series (Android TV)

patches.name: Disable Firebase analytics
patches.description: Prevents Firebase Analytics from initializing, stopping event and user-property reporting to Google.

compatiblePackages.name: ZEE5
compatiblePackages.description: ZEE5: Movies, TV Shows, Series (Android TV)
